seo.title: Jerahmeel Studio — AI-Powered Creative Solutions for Modern Brands
seo.description: Jerahmeel Studio helps businesses create premium visuals, AI advertisements, and websites that turn attention into customers.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hi Jerahmeel Studio, I'd like to talk about a project.

hero.headline: AI-Powered Creative Solutions for Modern Brands
hero.subtext: We help businesses create premium visuals, advertisements, and websites that stop the scroll and turn attention into customers.

services.title: Photo Editing
services.description: Professional photo retouching, enhancement, restoration and high-end editing.

services.title: AI Visual Design
services.description: Creative AI-generated posters, product ads, social media designs, branding visuals and marketing graphics.

services.title: AI Advertisement Videos
services.description: Short AI-powered promotional videos for products, businesses and social media advertising.

services.title: Website Design
services.description: Modern responsive websites designed for businesses, brands and personal portfolios.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: Streamlined AI-assisted workflows that keep your project moving without sacrificing quality.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Quality
whyChooseUs.description: Every visual is refined by hand until it meets a premium, client-ready standard.

whyChooseUs.title: Creative AI Workflow
whyChooseUs.description: A hybrid process pairing AI speed with human creative direction.

whyChooseUs.title: Attention to Detail
whyChooseUs.description: Careful, considered execution on every brief — nothing shipped half-finished.

testimonials.name: Amara Chukwu
testimonials.quote: Jerahmeel Studio turned our brand visuals around fast, and the quality was well above what we expected for the price.

testimonials.name: David Okon
testimonials.quote: Our new ad creatives brought in noticeably more orders within the first week of posting them.

testimonials.name: Ifeoma Obi
testimonials.quote: Communication was smooth and every revision came back better than the last. Highly recommend.

about.heading: About Jerahmeel Studio
about.body: Jerahmeel Studio helps brands create premium digital content through a blend of AI-driven creative tools and hands-on design craft. From photo editing and AI-generated visuals to full websites, every project is built to help businesses look sharper, feel more premium, and convert more attention into customers.
